text.title: Handover Pack Template Outsource Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example demonstrating a clean application of Handover Pack Template Outsource, anchored to the schema in content/02-output-contract.xml.

example.title: Handover Pack Template Outsource — clean application
example.note: acme-platform-rebuild — Olena rotating off; pack hp-2026-acme-001 drafted with 12 decisions, 4 open issues, 6 runbooks tested; receiving owner Marko notified.
